The Clearfield County Fairgrounds, also known as The Driving Park in Clearfield, PA.

Located at 205 Stadium Drive, Clearfield, PA. It has grapes growing along the fences as well as crabapple trees, wild cherry trees, and wild blueberries. Access: Public.
